Here are my investigations and articles published in English, along with my main publications - books, academic articles, journalistic investigations, and tutorials - in Portuguese.

# English

## Data-driven investigations

[**Territories of Exception**](https://documental.xyz/intervencao)

Violation of rights and the use of police helicopters in Rio de Janeiro.

[**Expulsions**](https://documental.xyz/expulsions)

Forced displacements and archaeological destruction by the mega-mining project Mirador in the Ecuadorian Amazonia

## Academic articles

[**Into the crossfire: Evaluating the use of a language model to crowdsource gun violence reports**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.12989)

arXiv preprint, 2024. With Scott Hale and Luc Rocher.

[**Analyzing Misinformation Claims During the 2022 Brazilian General Election on WhatsApp, Twitter, and Kwai**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.02395)

arXiv preprint, 2024. With Scott Hale, Ahmed Mostafa and Chico Camargo.

[**Activism in landscapes: culture, spectrum and Latin America**](https://spheres-journal.org/contribution/activism-in-landscapes-culture-spectrum-and-latin-america/)

Spheres - Journal for Digital Cultures, 2016. With Paulo Lara and Francisco Caminati.

## Article

[**Free spectrum and freedom of expression in the 21st century**](https://www.apc.org/en/news/free-spectrum-and-freedom-expression-21st-century)

The article explores the differences between the concepts of "free spectrum" and "open spectrum" in relation to challenges around freedom of expression in the 21st century.
